title: Shikkoku-no-rai
description: Adds the ability to change swords to katana by renaming
body:
# _Requires Optifine or CITResewn_
**Rename any sword to Shikkoku-no-rai and it becomes a katana. The sword will be sheathed in your left hand.**![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qqZXh3t4/images/60bab7c64514d88054c31635093d0ab36b74b287.png)
